description.value: The Front Desk projection + sync room for bounded-systems — keeps org project #2 ("Front Desk") in shape and tied to every repo, and (spike) computes a behavioral prioritization + budget contract over it.  contract. ts — the board contract (fields, views, workflows, insights).
